title: MY:TIME competitive-intelligence targets
description: Single source of truth for who is tracked and how. Read at runtime; never hardcode targets.

id.description: Stable slug; used as the foreign key everywhere downstream.

legal_entity.description: Registered legal entity (Cyrillic). Ground-truth key for registry_financials.

is_self.description: true = MY:TIME's own brand (uses official APIs + the XML feed); false = competitor (public scrapers only).

enabled.description: false = no website; excluded from the depletion engine (e.g. Chapter 03).

source.description: Collection method. Competitors: apify|firecrawl (chosen in Phase 1). MY:TIME: xml_feed.

feed_env.description: For source=xml_feed: name of the env var holding the full feed URL (keeps the secret out of config).

monobrand.description: true = single-brand franchise (Pandora/Swarovski); depletion reflects demand for that one brand only.

per_location_stock.description: Whether per-location stock is exposed. null until profiled. false = depletion degrades to price/assortment tracking.

locations.description: Discovered location identifiers, if the site exposes per-location availability.

social.description: A platform key is present only where a public handle exists. Competitors: public metrics only.

registry.description: Seam for Macedonian Central Registry (Централен регистар) financials. Not scraped yet.
